short_blurb: Roofing services for Hawthorne homes, commercial buildings, and aerospace-corridor properties.
local_note: Hawthorne is a dense South Bay city with a significant commercial and industrial base around LAX and the aerospace corridor. Residential neighborhoods have a mix of post-war bungalows and some newer townhome developments. We handle flat commercial roofing on industrial and office buildings as well as residential replacements throughout Hawthorne and the surrounding South Bay.

faqs.q: Do you work on commercial buildings near the LAX aerospace corridor in Hawthorne?
faqs.a: Yes. We've done TPO and modified bitumen roofing on commercial and industrial buildings throughout the South Bay, including the Hawthorne/El Segundo area. We work nights and weekends when tenants require it.
